scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix services/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/workers-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/incidents-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/inspections-service"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix services/auth-service && npm install --prefix services/workers-service && npm install --prefix services/incidents-service && npm install --prefix services/inspections-service
